global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear call to action and engaging content.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to explore trending content on the PulsePlay app.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A simplified app interface featuring a circular and square shape in muted tones, suggesting a user-friendly design.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including a circle and a square, adds visual interest to the app interface.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: A bold, white headline stating 'Watch what's trending' with a smaller subtext 'New hits every week' below it.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: The logo 'PulsePlay' appears at the top of the ad in a prominent font, colored white against the purple background.

elements.label: Install button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
